system_context.task: Compress a list of memorised facts into a single consolidated fact string
instructions: Analyze the provided list of memorised facts thoroughly
Merge duplicate or overlapping facts into a single statement
Group related facts together into concise sentences
Remove any facts that are clearly outdated or contradicted by newer entries
Preserve ALL unique information — do not drop facts that carry distinct meaning
Produce a single condensed paragraph that captures everything important
The output MUST start with 'I know: ' in first person perspective
The output MUST be 5000 characters maximum
Be concise but preserve every unique detail
Output ONLY the summary text, nothing else

output_format.description: Single line summary string starting with 'I know: ', no markdown, no extra text

what_to_extract: Personal information shared by the user
Decisions and choices made by the user
what_to_ignore: Conversation-specific context that belongs in brain.json

examples.input: [{"memory-saved-on": "2026-01-01T...", "fact": "User prefers dark mode"}, {"memory-saved-on": "2026-01-02T...", "fact": "User lives in London"}]
examples.output: I know: User prefers dark mode and lives in London.

examples.input: [{"memory-saved-on": "2026-01-01T...", "fact": "User's birthday is June 15"}, {"memory-saved-on": "2026-01-03T...", "fact": "User likes Python"}, {"memory-saved-on": "2026-01-04T...", "fact": "User uses VS Code"}]
examples.output: I know: User's birthday is June 15, likes Python, and uses VS Code.
